item.title:
HOME.
The Artemis II crew has arrived back on Earth, ending a nearly 10-day journey around the Moo...
item.description:
HOME.
The Artemis II crew has arrived back on Earth, ending a nearly 10-day journey around the Moon. The trip took them farther into space than humans have ever gone before, and now they're safely home with us.
https://t.co/XmDQwNlCPR https://t.co/Cwu312cZqJ
--- @NASA | ❤️ 56484 | 🔁 10746 | 💬 901 | 👁 676396
item.author: @NASA

點燃一個一個的小火種. Love it!

item.title: President Trump congratulated the Artemis II crew upon their successful return to Earth on Friday, s...
item.description:
President Trump congratulated the Artemis II crew upon their successful return to Earth on Friday, saying he "could not be more proud" of the team.
Read more: https://t.co/tDdYrNjyiE https://t.co/ojW2mCRL9W
--- @ABC | ❤️ 66 | 🔁 20 | 💬 39 | 👁 17317
item.author: @ABC

item.title: ARTEMIS II SPLASHDOWN: The four-person crew of the Artemis II mission successfully completed their 6...
item.description:
ARTEMIS II SPLASHDOWN: The four-person crew of the Artemis II mission successfully completed their 695,081-mile, 10-day journey around the moon.
The astronauts will stay inside the Orion capsule as it’s powered down and recovery teams move in to help them out. https://t.co/NJvQa4rP71
--- @ABC | ❤️ 92 | 🔁 30 | 💬 5 | 👁 16632
item.author: @ABC

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇸 Welcome home! 🇺🇸🇺🇸
item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: Grok can be quite funny 😂 https://t.co/kopVI70H32
item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: Commander Reid Wiseman and his crew asked permission while in space to name a fresh crater after his...
item.description:
Commander Reid Wiseman and his crew asked permission while in space to name a fresh crater after his late wife, Carroll.
Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen made the request right before Monday's lunar fly-around.
Carroll Wiseman, a neonatal nurse, died of cancer in 2020. https://t.co/cDDNGDJhc2
--- @ABC | ❤️ 440 | 🔁 56 | 💬 5 | 👁 42352
item.author: @ABC

item.title: ARTEMIS II: Orion has splashed down in the Pacific Ocean at the expected time of 8:07 p.m. ET, marki...
item.description:
ARTEMIS II: Orion has splashed down in the Pacific Ocean at the expected time of 8:07 p.m. ET, marking an end to the crew's 10-day, 695,081-mile journey around the moon and back.
Follow live updates: https://t.co/obevyEPTg6 https://t.co/abjidndRgM
--- @ABC | ❤️ 57 | 🔁 21 | 💬 8 | 👁 16455
item.author: @ABC

item.title:
Chris Brown and Usher are joining forces and taking their show on the road.
The two artists announ...
item.description:
Chris Brown and Usher are joining forces and taking their show on the road.
The two artists announced a joint tour on Friday, dubbed the R&amp;B Tour, a reference to their last names, Raymond — Usher's full name is Usher Raymond IV — and Brown. https://t.co/gTj4ppEGCo
--- @ABC | ❤️ 192 | 🔁 39 | 💬 11 | 👁 19277
item.author: @ABC

item.title:
Welcome home Reid, Victor, Christina, and Jeremy! 🫶
The Artemis II astronauts have splashed down at...
item.description:
Welcome home Reid, Victor, Christina, and Jeremy! 🫶
The Artemis II astronauts have splashed down at 8:07pm ET (0007 UTC April 11), bringing their historic 10-day mission around the Moon to an end. https://t.co/1yjAgHEOYl
--- @NASA | ❤️ 293150 | 🔁 88685 | 💬 5232 | 👁 23579442
item.author: @NASA

item.title: BREAKING: The Artemis II crew has successfully splashed down in the Pacific Ocean after a historic 6...
item.description:

item.author: @ABC

item.title: Orion's main parachute has deployed. The spacecraft has a system of 11 chutes that will slow it down...
item.description:
Orion's main parachute has deployed. The spacecraft has a system of 11 chutes that will slow it down from around 300 mph to 20 mph for splashdown.
Get more updates on the Artemis II blog: https://t.co/7gicm7DWBt https://t.co/ReXHTfkFld
--- @NASA | ❤️ 42720 | 🔁 9398 | 💬 578 | 👁 2597191
item.author: @NASA

item.title:

Fol...

item.author: @ABC

item.title: HAPPENING NOW: The Artemis II crew has successfully reentered Earth’s atmosphere. They are now enter...
item.description:
HAPPENING NOW: The Artemis II crew has successfully reentered Earth’s atmosphere. They are now entering a short communication blackout before splashdown.
Follow live updates: https://t.co/obevyEPTg6 https://t.co/v1lGJQBkWb
--- @ABC | ❤️ 223 | 🔁 55 | 💬 13 | 👁 30607

item.title: Orion has reentered the Earth's atmosphere at an altitude of 400,000 feet, reaching peak heating and...
item.description:
Orion has reentered the Earth's atmosphere at an altitude of 400,000 feet, reaching peak heating and speed as it travels nearly 35 times the speed of sound.
Follow live updates: https://t.co/obevyEPTg6 https://t.co/4lAG5BgGfF
--- @ABC | ❤️ 130 | 🔁 20 | 💬 11 | 👁 13365
item.author: @ABC

item.title: JUST IN: The Orion crew module and service module have officially separated, revealing the spacecraf...
item.author: @ABC

item.title: ARTEMIS II: The heat shield is on the underside of the spacecraft, where it will protect the crew up...
item.description:
ARTEMIS II: The heat shield is on the underside of the spacecraft, where it will protect the crew upon entry into Earth's atmosphere.
That shield will withstand temperatures of up to 5,000 degrees Fahrenheit during the high-speed entry. https://t.co/oXgiGjO6eG
--- @ABC | ❤️ 187 | 🔁 49 | 💬 12 | 👁 51479
item.author: @ABC

item.title: JUST IN: The Orion crew module and service module have officially separated, revealing the spacecraf...
item.description:
JUST IN: The Orion crew module and service module have officially separated, revealing the spacecraft’s heat shield.
That shield will withstand temperatures of up to 5,000 degrees Fahrenheit during the high-speed entry.
Follow live updates: https://t.co/obevyEPTg6 https://t.co/pVcJsRxh8h
--- @ABC | ❤️ 145 | 🔁 51 | 💬 13 | 👁 16662

item.description:
A man has been arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the San Francisco home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, the company said.
No one was hurt, according to the San Francisco Police Department and OpenAI. https://t.co/QEG5MC8Grk https://t.co/KOQdaZwRaB

item.description:

item.title: The U.S. Geological Survey warned residents of Southern California that they should expect to hear a...
item.description:
The U.S. Geological Survey warned residents of Southern California that they should expect to hear a sonic boom from the Artemis II reentry in a few hours.
The sonic boom is expected between approximately 5-5:15 p.m. PT, it said. https://t.co/IbOkyGsDRv

item.title:
After a journey of more than 690,000 miles, the crew is nearly home.
The Artemis II crew will splas...
item.description:
After a journey of more than 690,000 miles, the crew is nearly home.
The Artemis II crew will splash down off the coast of San Diego later today and, though it won’t be visible from land, you can still wave in their general direction to welcome them back to Earth! 👋 https://t.co/ZZX23QCTpb
--- @NASA | ❤️ 68616 | 🔁 8034 | 💬 1247 | 👁 2666707
item.author: @NASA

item.title: "Jeopardy!" contestant Jamie Ding nabbed his 20th straight win on Thursday night's episode...
item.description:
"Jeopardy!" contestant Jamie Ding nabbed his 20th straight win on Thursday night's episode, bringing his total winnings so far to $572,600.
Ding's latest win has now moved him up to the No. 7 spot for most consecutive wins, according to the game show. https://t.co/9DL6G7MBdL
--- @ABC | ❤️ 30 | 🔁 10 | 💬 7 | 👁 12984
item.author: @ABC

item.title:
Your close personal friends, the @NASAArtemis astronauts (and Rise), can't wait to get home!
In the...
item.description:
Your close personal friends, the @NASAArtemis astronauts (and Rise), can't wait to get home!
In the meantime, enjoy a few new pictures from their camera roll. And watch their return with us live at https://t.co/z1RgZwQkWS. https://t.co/gJBvWTdlWM
--- @NASA | ❤️ 40404 | 🔁 4607 | 💬 371 | 👁 1059668
item.author: @NASA

item.title: The Artemis II splashdown is set to take place tonight at 8:07 p.m. ET within 100 miles of the coast...
item.description:
The Artemis II splashdown is set to take place tonight at 8:07 p.m. ET within 100 miles of the coast of San Diego, California, according to NASA. ABC News' Jaclyn Lee reports.
https://t.co/uHI3wikgXs https://t.co/yIbe8qYGzO

Here's a timeline of how splashdown is expected to unfold. https://t.co/GcEen7Jh4J https://t.co/Cto6vsnceK

...
item.description:

This burn ensures the spacecraft maintains the proper trajectory back to Earth.
Follow live updates: https://t.co/ko1rDR2Yfx

item.title: Artemis II astronauts have traveled 252,756 miles from Earth, flown around the Moon, and observed th...
item.description:

Watch the crew splash down on Friday, April 10, around 8:07pm ET (0007 UTC April 11). https://t.co/Ccsk5Z3HFS https://t.co/QoJW2oYVFG

item.title: The news reports on Binance’s “relocation package” are misleading, trying to make a negative spin on...
item.description:
The news reports on Binance’s “relocation package” are misleading, trying to make a negative spin on UAE again. It’s nothing new. Binance has always offered flexible work locations to employees, with reasonable relocation packages based on situation (as I mentioned in my book).
I personally think UAE remains one of the safest countries in the world, far safer than many touristy countries in the world.
In fact, I might do a book signing event in Dubai soon. Who wants to come?
--- @cz_binance | ❤️ 590 | 🔁 88 | 💬 290 | 👁 210349
item.author: @cz_binance

As the crew prepares to splash down in the Pacific Oce...
item.description:

ABC News' Elizabeth Schulze reports. https://t.co/cZb9bDJTzr https://t.co/OUut1va9V5

item.description:
Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Majid Takht-Ravanchi said Friday that Tehran’s proposed 10-point plan will be the basis for the negotiations, according to the Islamic Republic News Agency.
Follow live updates: https://t.co/1q6i42oawI

item.description:
The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps said in a statement on Friday that Iran’s armed forces have not carried out any airstrikes against other countries since the ceasefire began.
